rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identified several places where the asserted contribution outruns what the text actually substantiates, but did not fully engage with the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the headline claim), but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly correctly identified that the output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), but noted some minor drifts in scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent flagged one minor regression, but did not identify harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: The agent correctly annotated every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
